# Siedel's Barbershop

> Traditional barbershop at 982 N Court Street, Medina, Ohio. Eleven barbers and stylists. Cash only. ATM on site. Rated 4.9 stars across 249 reviews.

Siedel's Barbershop opened in 2018 in Medina, Ohio, named as a tribute to Carl Siedel. Owner and master barber Jim LaMarca has been cutting hair since 1995. The shop serves Medina and surrounding Medina County — cuts, fades, beard work, straight razor shaves, and group bookings. Cash only. ATM on site.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 982 N Court Street, Medina, Ohio 44256
- Phone: (330) 952-0777
- Email: siedelsbarbershop@gmail.com
- Book online: https://app.squareup.com/appointments/buyer/widget/xcru7izyf4zhv6/LFCOT5CC7MY0S

## Hours

- Monday: 8 AM – 8 PM
- Tuesday: 8 AM – 6 PM
- Wednesday: 8 AM – 6 PM
- Thursday: 8 AM – 8 PM
- Friday: 8 AM – 6 PM
- Saturday: 8 AM – 3 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Services & Prices

- Haircut: $34 (30 min) — Precision men's haircut with clippers, shears, or both. Neck clean-up included.
- Razor / Foil Fade: $40 (30 min) — Skin-tight fade with foil shaver and straight razor lineup.
- Haircut + Beard Trim: $44 (50 min) — Full haircut with beard shape, line work, and beard oil. Most popular.
- Haircut + Face Shave: $65 (55 min) — Full haircut with straight razor face shave, hot towels, cold finish.
- Full Service Shave: $46 (30 min) — Classic straight razor shave. Hot towels, two passes, aftershave balm.
- Head Shave: $42 (35 min) — Full head shave with straight razor and scalp treatment.
- Beard Trim: $31 (20 min) — Beard shape-up, cheek and neck lines, beard oil finish.
- Shoulder Length Cut + Rough Dry: $40 (30 min) — Longer men's styles with shear work and rough dry.
- Duo Haircut: $64 (60 min) — Two haircuts back-to-back. Father + son, brothers, or two friends.
- Trio Haircut: $90 (90 min) — Three haircuts coordinated. Families or groomsmen.

## Team

Eleven barbers and stylists on staff. Each has their own online booking link.

- Jim LaMarca — Master Barber & Owner. Cutting since 1995. Specializes in bald fades and kids' cuts.
- Billy Rodriguez — Master Barber. Cutting since 2010. Clean cuts, fades, flattops, tapers.
- Patrick Muranko — Master Barber. Cutting since 2022. Fades, classic cuts, beard trims.
- Matt Hayes — Master Barber. Cutting since 2019. Clean fades, simple cuts, hot towel face shaves.
- Sam Sickle — Stylist. Cutting since 2021. Clipper cuts, longer styles, shear work.
- Krista Foecking — Master Stylist. Cutting since 2000. Men's fades, kids' cuts, color work.
- Pierre Wright — Master Barber. Cutting since 2003. Fades, designs, classic cuts.
- Will Dillon — Master Barber. Cutting since 2016. Tight fades, designs, razor lineups, hot towel shaves.
- Chris Hodge — Master Barber. Cutting since 2022. Taper fades, clipper cuts, beard trims.
- Ticia Husak — Master Stylist. Cutting since 2010. Clipper, scissor, and foil cuts.
- Shannon Hadick — Master Stylist. Cutting since 2017. Men's and women's cuts, fades.
